mnemonics: Mean Median Mode: Mother Makes Meals
keyPoints: Introduction: Big Data is like a Big Brown Bear - it needs to be handled carefully.
Big Data Analysis Framework: Mother Makes Meals with 3 steps - M, M, M.
Descriptive Statistics: Mean, Median, Mode - 3 types of summary statistics.
Univariate Data Analysis: A single variable, like a single note in a song.
Visualization: A picture is worth a thousand words, like a colorful chart to understand the data.
